title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIIT. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!
